title: artemisia alba subsp. nevadensis
intro: Artemisia alba subsp. nevadensis, also known as Nevada Silver Sage or Great Basin Sage, is a subspecies of the Artemisia alba plant, a type of sage native to the Great Basin region of North America. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Artemisia alba subsp. nevadensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to reap its medicinal benefits.
